verdict.answer_first: A leads with the actionable bottom line: "The one real problem"; B also starts well with "fetches run sequentially," but A is sharper.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to the one recommendation: "Fix — fire them concurrently"; B expands into 4 secondary points plus a process note.
verdict.fabrication: B invents context: "global config routes diff reviews" and "this dir isn't a git repo"; A's "100× slower" is overconfident as a worst-case-style number, but less extraneous.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save and apply: problem, fix, two caveats. B adds useful but diluted extras like input guards and tool-process commentary.
